/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX11.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_boids.dir/test_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_boids.dir/src/behavior/Boids.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_boids.dir/src/behavior/Flock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_boids.dir/src/behavior/Friendly.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_boids.dir/src/BoidGenTemp.cpp.o -o test_boids  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
